config.name: Reserve Stress — Moderate (shock=0.005)
config.hypothesis: Under moderate shocks (shock=0.005), the optimal deployment threshold shifts toward conservative reserves

findings: Optimal treasury threshold by fitness: 0.30 (mean fitness: 0.5478) at shock=0.005
Peak population stability at threshold = 0.80 (mean pop: 49.3)
Treasury ratio: 0.0046 at deployment (0.10) vs 0.0127 at hoarding (0.90)
No collapses observed across entire threshold range
Mean catastrophe deaths: 3.0 at deployment vs 2.9 at hoarding
Population volatility: 6.77 at deployment vs 6.64 at hoarding
